_comment: MiniAgent Hooks — shell commands triggered by lifecycle events. Exit code 2 = block.

PreToolUse.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(0) if not any(k in cmd.lower() for k in ['rm -rf /','shutdown','reboot','mkfs.']) else sys.exit(2)"

PreToolUse._comment: Secret scan before git commit — blocks if keys/tokens found in staged changes

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-commit after file modifications (secret scan runs before commit)
PostToolUse.command: cd /root/miniagent && python3 secret_scan.py && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'Hook: auto-commit after write/edit'
